heading: Political union between Territory of Guam and Commonwealth of Northern Mariana Islands
label: 1844 Political union between Territory of Guam and Commonwealth of Northern Mariana Islands
notes: CodificationSection was formerly set out as a note under .section 1681 of this title

children.label: i
children.text: there will be no diminution of any rights or entitlements otherwise eligible to said territory and Commonwealth in effect on the effective date of such union,

children.label: ii
children.text: there will be no adverse effect on any funds which have been or may hereafter be authorized or appropriated for said territory or Commonwealth, as of the effective date of such union, or

children.label: iii
children.text: no action is taken that would in any manner discourage such unification.
